creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
Created attachment 163063
ess-drop_maintainership.patch

As outlined in http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-November/096678.html and subsequent discussion, I do not see the requirement to continue maintaining math/ess as port.

I suggest to drop that port from ports. Alternatively, I would like to drop maintainership.

Anyhow, thanks to all people at ports who have helped me in maintaining math/ess.

Cheers
